name: Beatles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and first amount of sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, salt, baking soda, and baking powder.
4. Alternately add dry ingredients and sour cream to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with dry ingredients, mixing until just combined.
5. Stir in vanilla extract and chocolate pieces.
6. Drop heaping teaspoons of dough onto greased baking sheets.
7. Sprinkle remaining sugar and cinnamon evenly over each cookie.
8. Bake at 375°F for 12 minutes.
